_README: Editable scoring parameters. Change any value and re-run build.py to re-derive every table. 'best finish only' is enforced by build.py: a county's score in a year is the MAXIMUM points it qualifies for across its provincial result and its All-Ireland-series stage. Set a tier to 0 to disable it. The provincial CHAMPION tier is normally 0 because champions always advance to the All-Ireland series and score higher there via best-finish; raise it only if you want to reward winning a province in its own right.
_LEAGUE_README: Points for the National Football League (Division 1), used ONLY in the 'overall annual performance' view that ADDS league points to championship points for the same year. The league is a separate competition from the championship, so within a year the two are added (not best-of); within each competition best-finish still applies. The league is deliberately scored below the championship: a Division 1 title (2) equals a championship quarter-final and is worth less than an All-Ireland semi-final (3).
